browsePage.allGearDescription: Browse our comprehensive gear catalog featuring the latest cameras and lenses from all major brands. Results are ordered by release date by default with newer items appearing first.

underConstructionPage.metaDescription: See which gear entries are still incomplete and help fill in missing specs.
underConstructionPage.intro1: This page highlights gear that is incomplete in our database. Items marked Under construction have critical specs missing, such as mount, sensor, or focal length. Items labeled Low completeness do not meet our filled-spec threshold yet, but may still be usable.
underConstructionPage.intro2: Rows are prioritized by missing key specs first and overall completion percentage second. Open any row in the modal to contribute updates.
underConstructionPage.discardDescription: You have unsaved changes. If you exit now, your edits will be lost.
underConstructionPage.missingKeySpecs: We are missing the following key specs:
underConstructionPage.contributeInfo: Click here to contribute the information needed
underConstructionPage.missingKeySpecsLong: This page is under construction because we are missing the following key specs:
underConstructionPage.crowdSourcedDescription: We have a contributor-driven gear database with controlled crowd-sourcing. Members propose updates to technical specs, which are reviewed before going live. Approved contributions are credited on the page and count toward contributor recognition.

learnBasicsPage.metaDescription: Start learning photography fundamentals, including modern cameras, exposure, and beginner-friendly paths.
learnBasicsPage.pageDescription: Here you can find a comprehensive guide to the basics of photography and photography gear. These guides will set you up for success with your first camera, and help you understand the basics of photography.

hallOfFamePage.metaDescription: Explore Sharply’s Hall of Fame, a curated collection of the most iconic and influential cameras and lenses in photography history.
hallOfFamePage.intro: This hall of fame list collects some of the most iconic and influential gear in the history of photography. We curate this list to highlight the cameras and lenses that have had the most impact on the industry and the community over the years and those that are well known even today despite their age.
hallOfFamePage.emptyTitle: No hall of fame entries are available yet.
hallOfFamePage.emptyDescription: Add gear data to your local database and reload this page to celebrate legendary equipment.

sony-a9-iii.text: Featuring the world's first global shutter, the Sony A9 III earns its place in the hall of fame as a camera body that pushed the boundaries of what a camera could do.

tamron-35-150mm-f-2-2-8-di-iii-vxd.text: The truly innovative and impressive Tamron 35-150mm f/2-2.8 earns its place in the hall of fame for its unique versatility and groundbreaking focal range at a bright aperture. To see such an original design and spec list paired with solid performance at a reasonable price is a rare occurrence, and deserves to be celebrated. While it may have originally been created for travel photography, many can find it useful in a range of other genres including sports, video, and event or wedding work.

nikon-d500.text: Celebrated for fast, reliable autofocus and a rugged build, the Nikon D500 earns its place in the hall of fame as one of the most capable APS-C cameras ever sold. Even today, it is still a popular choice for wildlife and sports photography.

nikon-af-s-dx-nikkor-35mm-f-1-8g.text: The first Nikon DX lens to feature an f/1.8 aperture, perfect for low-light and portrait photography.

nikon-nikkor-z-24-70mm-f-2-8-s-ii.text: As the first f/2.8 standard zoom lens with an internal zoom mechanism, the Nikkor Z 24-70 f/2.8 S II earns its spot in our hall of fame as an exceptional professional standard zoom, despite offering only marginal improvements over its already impressive predecessor. It is a versatile lens that is still popular today and is a great all-rounder.

canon-rf28-70mm-f2-l-usm.text: The Canon RF 28-70mm f/2 L USM is the first f/2 constant-aperture standard zoom lens for full-frame cameras.

nikon-nikkor-z-58mm-f-0-95-s-noct.text: Nikon's fastest lens, and the first full-frame lens with flagship performance to feature an f/0.95 aperture. This manual-focus lens earns a spot in the hall of fame as a pioneer of wide-aperture performance.

canon-eos-5d-mark-ii.text: As the first DSLR to feature 1080p Full HD video recording, the Canon EOS 5D Mark II earns a spot in the hall of fame as the camera that began the push toward hybrid camera bodies that can shoot photos and videos.

nikon-d90.text: The Nikon D90 was the first DSLR to feature 720p video recording, and was a major turning point for DSLR video.

nikon-af-s-nikkor-50mm-f-1-8g.text: In the ultra-competitive 50mm prime lens market, Nikon's AF-S 50mm f/1.8G is one of the most well-known options. It is an excellent, budget-friendly full-frame 50mm prime lens for F-mount. As one of Nikon's best-selling lenses, it delivers so much value that most photographers have little reason to consider pricier options unless they specifically need top-tier professional performance. Many years later, it is still frequently recommended to new photographers and used by professionals.

aboutPage.metaDescription: Learn what Sharply is building, why it exists, and how photographers can help shape an open reference for gear knowledge.
aboutPage.heroDescription: Sharply is building a modern reference for photography knowledge. We bring together accurate, open gear data, structured community insight, and focused editorial context to make photography information clear, reliable, and accessible for every photographer.
aboutPage.heroBanner: Photography knowledge made open and accessible for everyone!
aboutPage.missionTitle: We're building a better way to learn about and find gear.
aboutPage.missionBody: Sharply is designed to be a clear, reliable reference for photography gear, built around how people actually research and use equipment. Instead of prioritizing long-form opinion, Sharply focuses on structured specifications, real-world samples, and precise answers to specific questions. By organizing gear data, comparisons, and editorial insight into a searchable, consistent system, Sharply aims to become the first place photographers turn when evaluating cameras, lenses, and tools.
aboutPage.valuesOpenDescription: Our data, specs, and insights are accessible to everyone and explained in plain language.
aboutPage.valuesCommunityDescription: Contributions come from photographers like you and are reviewed by trusted editors before they go live.
aboutPage.valuesModernDescription: A clean, modern experience makes it easy to explore gear, compare options, and find answers quickly.
aboutPage.valuesReliableDescription: Verified specs and curated context help you make decisions with more confidence.
aboutPage.problemBody1: Photography knowledge is scattered and inconsistent. Specs live on manufacturer sites, reviews are spread across many platforms, and testing methods vary so widely that meaningful comparisons are hard to make.
aboutPage.problemBody2: Many existing standards are also difficult to access. They are often written for labs or institutions, hidden behind jargon or paywalls, and out of reach for everyday photographers.
aboutPage.problemBody3: The result is fragmented information, uneven trust, and a system that too often favors insiders over the wider photography community.
aboutPage.solutionBody1: We believe photography knowledge should be open, transparent, and accessible to everyone, whether you are buying your first camera or evaluating a flagship system for professional work.
aboutPage.solutionBody2: Sharply brings together accurate gear data, structured community insight, and thoughtful editorial to make learning and comparing simpler and more useful.
aboutPage.solutionBody3: Long term, we want to help create open standards for photography testing and data practices so the community can rely on clearer, more repeatable methods.
aboutPage.solutionBody4: That future depends on clarity, accessibility, and collaboration. By working with photographers, contributors, and brands, Sharply can serve today's needs while helping define tomorrow's open photography standards.
aboutPage.workflowDescription: Anyone can contribute to the database by submitting changes or suggestions. That community process helps keep the catalog more accurate, current, and useful.
aboutPage.timelineStep1Description: If you find missing or incorrect information on a gear page, you can send us a correction or suggestion.
aboutPage.timelineStep2Description: Editors review the submission, verify the details, and follow up if more context is needed.
aboutPage.timelineStep3Description: Once approved, the change is published for everyone to see and your contribution is credited on the platform.
aboutPage.ctaDescription: We are always looking for people who share this mission. Whether you are a reviewer, developer, or simply passionate about photography, you can help shape the future of photography knowledge.
aboutPage.checklistWriteReviews: Write reviews and share your experiences

errors.notFoundDescription: The page you’re looking for flew the coop. Try searching for gear, or head back home.

metadata.siteDescription: Real specs, real reviews, real fast. Sharply is the newest and most comprehensive photography gear database and review platform featuring expert reviews, real specs, and side-by-side comparisons in a modern, minimalist interface.
